zh.title: 产品特性
zh.subtitle: Spec-First 提供完整的规范驱动开发解决方案

features.title: 阶段状态机
features.description: 8 个活动阶段（00_init → 07_release）+ 2 个终止状态（08_done/09_cancelled），单向不可逆流程确保开发规范。

features.title: 追溯 ID 体系
features.description: 14 类 ID 覆盖业务链路（FR/DS/TASK/TC/RFC）和 V-Model（REQ/SYS/ARCH/MOD/ATP/STP/ITP/UTP），实现完整追溯。

features.title: Gate 质量门禁
features.description: 19 条校验规则（16 条阻塞 + 3 条警告），阶段推进前强制质量保障，支持豁免管理。

features.title: Skill 编排引擎
features.description: 20+ AI 驱动的 Skill 覆盖全生命周期，智能引导需求分析、技术设计、代码实现等环节。

features.title: 覆盖率矩阵
features.description: 5 项覆盖率指标（C3/C4/C6/C8/C9）实时监控规范覆盖度，确保需求到实现的完整追踪。

features.title: 变更管理
features.description: RFC（变更请求）+ Defect（缺陷）双轨管理，支持影响分析和状态追踪。

en.title: Product Features
en.subtitle: Spec-First provides a complete specification-driven development solution

features.title: Stage State Machine
features.description: 8 active stages (00_init → 07_release) + 2 terminal states (08_done/09_cancelled), unidirectional flow ensures development discipline.

features.title: Traceability ID System
features.description: 14 ID types covering business chain (FR/DS/TASK/TC/RFC) and V-Model (REQ/SYS/ARCH/MOD/ATP/STP/ITP/UTP), enabling complete traceability.

features.title: Gate Quality Checks
features.description: 19 validation rules (16 blocking + 3 warnings), enforcing quality before stage advancement with exemption management.

features.title: Skill Orchestration Engine
features.description: 20+ AI-powered Skills covering the entire lifecycle, intelligently guiding requirements analysis, technical design, and code implementation.

features.title: Coverage Matrix
features.description: 5 coverage metrics (C3/C4/C6/C8/C9) monitoring specification coverage in real-time, ensuring complete requirement-to-implementation tracing.

features.title: Change Management
features.description: RFC (Request for Change) + Defect dual-track management with impact analysis and status tracking.

layers.name: Core Engines
layers.description: State machine, traceability, gate, templates, etc.
